description: Power BI parameter definitions. Import these into Power BI Desktop as a Power Query parameter or use pDataFolder directly in each .pq file.

pDataFolder.description: Root folder containing the CSV source files. Update this path to match your local environment before loading queries in Power BI Desktop.

pFiscalYearStartMonth.description: Month number (1-12) on which the fiscal year begins. GFV fiscal year starts in July.

pCalendarStart.description: First date of the Calendar dimension. Extend earlier if historical data is loaded.

pCalendarEnd.description: Last date of the Calendar dimension. Extend to cover future target periods.

pOnTimeThresholdDays.description: Lead-time (days) at or below which a shipment is considered on-time. Matches the DAX On-Time Ship % measure.

local_csv.description: Default local CSV files — used for development and portfolio demo.

repo_relative.description: Paths relative to the cloned repository root — useful on macOS / Linux.
